name: svaha
description: Svaha — Claude Code that picks up exactly where it left off: frozen cross-session handoffs, a self-watching context budget, coherence guardrails, and an optional operator decision layer.

plugins.name: svaha
plugins.description: Installs Svaha's commands (boot/session/handoff/reflect/audit/foldin/init) and hooks only. The always-loaded CLAUDE.md behavior contract and the settings.json permission floor CANNOT be delivered by a plugin — run setup.sh for the complete install. Use the plugin XOR setup.sh for the hooks, never both (they would double-fire).
